name: butcher-shop
summary: A butcher's shop. Customer counter facing the street, back workroom with chopping blocks, hanging carcasses on hooks, a salt barrel for curing. Bloody apron, sharp knives.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle with customer counter short-side, workroom behind

accent.purpose: blood-stained zone under hooks and blocks

primary_palette.note: classic butcher — block, hanging meats, front counter
upscale butcher — display case for cut offerings

story_prompts: market morning — counter busy, butcher cutting to order, apprentice hauling carcass
suspicious delivery — an unmarked cart, a butcher arguing with a cloaked figure
inspection — guild official checking weights, butcher sweating
night cleanup — buckets of pink water, butcher scrubbing the blocks alone

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: practical working light (0.4) — visibility for precision cuts

anti_patterns: customer counter faces the street — workroom behind
meat hooks hang from ceiling against back wall, not centerfloor
don't forget the drain — blood has to go somewhere, imply it with stained texture
